comment: SHA-256 (truncated to 16 hex chars) of each rendered USER prompt template at the SENTINEL_RESUME placeholder + sentinel target context. Run npm test (lib/llm/__tests__/prompts.test.ts) — it asserts the live hashes equal these. M8 bumped v2 → v3: every query restructured for system-prompt + reasoning-first JSON + <resume_text> delimiters. Cache namespace bumped to apeds:v3 in lib/llm/perceive.ts in lockstep. Note: SYSTEM_PROMPT changes are NOT captured here — bump cache manually if SYSTEM_PROMPT itself changes. If a template intentionally changes, regenerate via `node --experimental-strip-types -e "import('./lib/llm/prompts.ts').then(m => console.log(JSON.stringify(m.hashPromptTemplates(), null, 2)))"` AND bump the cache version in lib/llm/perceive.ts (apeds:vN → apeds:vN+1) so stale cached completions don't pollute new prompts.
